data.title: Bitcoin Bottom In? Economist Alex Krüger Says Potential Bear Trap Awaits BTC – Here Are His Targets
data.description:

Alex Krüger tells his 206,200 followers on the social media platform X that if Bitcoin’s bottom is in, the flagship crypto asset will soon march back to $92,000. He also says a […]
The post Bitcoin Bottom In? Economist Alex Krüger Says Potential Bear Trap...
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/03/01/is-the-bitcoin-bottom-in-economist-alex-kruger-says-potential-bear-trap-awaits-btc-here-are-his-targets/

data.title:
The $TOTAL Altcoin market cap has yet again tested its 2024 highs just like the wick early February.

Technically, a higher low has been made but you'd want this level to be held.

The first level up to show some strength by the bulls would be breaking back above that $840B level…
2-year Treasury yield falls below 4% to reach the lowest point since October 2024
data.description:
The 2-year U.S. Treasury yield dropped below 4% for the first time since October 2024. The 2-year treasury yield went down by eight basis points to settle at 3.99%. U.S. Treasury yields and prices ‘see-sawed’ on Friday after a heated verbal exchange between the U.S. President Trump and Ukrainian President Zelenskyy signaled growing geopolitical tensions.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/2-year-treasury-yield-falls-below-4/
